metadata.title: Phoenix Communication — PR Agency Prague
metadata.description: A communications agency active in the Czech-Slovak market since 2009. Strategic PR, media relations, social media management.

hero.desc: A communications agency active in the Czech-Slovak market since 2009. We help companies communicate with the media, the public, and their own people.

about.label: About
about.headline:
Strategic.
Clear.
Relentlessly
results-focused.
points: We are a communications agency active in the Czech and Slovak markets since 2009.
We help companies communicate with the media, the public, and their own people — strategically, clearly, and with a relentless focus on results.
We blend analytical rigour, creativity, and hands-on experience — our own and that of a trusted network of specialists across disciplines.
We invest deeply and consistently in journalist relationships across sectors.
Every client engagement is bespoke. No off-the-shelf playbooks.
We deliver international projects across Europe.

items.name: Strategic PR
items.desc: Communications strategy, integrated campaigns, and reputation management — including crisis response.

items.name: Media Relations
items.desc: Sustained media engagement, earned coverage, and executive spokesperson training.

items.name: Social Media
items.desc: Content creation, channel management, paid campaigns, and performance marketing.

items.name: Influencer Marketing
items.desc: Talent identification, contract management, and deliverable oversight.

items.name: Internal Communications
items.desc: Employee engagement and partner communications that align with your external narrative.

items.name: Events & Projects
items.desc: Press events, influencer activations, partner gatherings, and public-facing experiences.

expertise.label: Expertise
expertise.title:

we know
inside out.
expertise.desc: Our track record spans diverse industries — from energy and technology to culture and sport.

clients.label: Clients
clients.title:

and international brands.
clients.desc: Our portfolio includes market leaders and fast-moving start-ups alike. For some we built communications from scratch; for others we drive long-term strategic goals.
